utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I thought it was gonna be a closed casket .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Well , that does not mean she can not look nice !

emotion_cause.span: 2_that does not mean she can not look nice !

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Sweetie , you think you can get in there ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I do not see why not .
